parameters.query: SELECT t.id as tenant_id, t.name, t.api_keys->>'shopify' as shopify_config FROM tenants t JOIN channels c ON c.tenant_id = t.id WHERE c.name = 'shopify' AND c.status = 'connected'

INSERT INTO orders (tenant_id, external_id, order_date, revenue, currency, customer_email, customer_id, is_returning_customer, source, medium, campaign, products) VALUES ({{ $json.tenant_id }}, '{{ $json.external_id }}', '{{ $json.order_date }}', {{ $json.revenue }}, '{{ $json.currency }}', '{{ $json.customer_email }}', '{{ $json.customer_id }}', {{ $json.is_returning_customer }}, '{{ $json.source }}', '{{ $json.medium }}', '{{ $json.campaign }}', '{{ $json.products }}'::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, external_id) DO UPDATE SET revenue = EXCLUDED.revenue, updated_at = NOW()

parameters.content:
## Shopify Data Ingestion

Runs every 15 minutes. For each tenant with Shopify connected:
1. Fetches orders from last 24 hours
2. Fetches product catalog
3. Processes UTM params, customer data, line items
4. Upserts into orders, products, product_metrics, daily_metrics

Rate limit aware: Shopify allows 2 req/sec per store.
